regime_note: Hormuz declared OPEN for remaining ceasefire period. Israel-Lebanon 10-day ceasefire live. WTI falling from $93.74 spike back to $90.79. Gold $4,885 holding ATH — safe-haven bid intact but oil bears returning. Trump says US-Iran deal 'possible soon', talks could resume weekend. Iran deputy FM still wants comprehensive deal (gap wide). AUDUSD/EURUSD long theses strengthened by de-escalation return. Still NO ENTRIES today — Friday + BoJ + Apr 22 binary.

watchlist.entry_plan: Long at ~0.7085 on pullback to broken resistance (now support)
watchlist.thesis: TOP PICK (Conv 4). Golden Cross on 4H. De-escalation = risk-on = AUD is the quintessential risk currency. DXY at 98.13 (7 straight down sessions). 0.7000 flipped from resistance to support. Best R:R of all setups (~2:1 to 3:1).

watchlist.entry_plan: Short at ~160.00-160.10 anticipating BoJ/MoF intervention (Japan intervened at 159.23 in Jan 2026, 191-pip crash in 5 min)
watchlist.size_plan: Calculate via risk_guard — keep small given binary risk
watchlist.thesis: ASYMMETRIC TRADE (Conv 3). Japan intervened at 159.23 in Jan — 160 is the red line. Daily RSI 76 = overbought + bearish divergence. BoJ on tightening path. Risk-on doesn't help yen but intervention overrides everything. R:R ~3:1 to 5:1.
watchlist.invalidation: If USDJPY breaks 160.50 cleanly (no intervention), cancel.

watchlist.entry_plan: Short at ~1.3820 on bounce to resistance
watchlist.thesis: DXY weakness play (Conv 3). DXY 98.13, 7 straight down days. CAD PM Carney won majority (stability). Oil $88 still above pre-crisis ($75) = supportive for CAD. R:R ~1.5:1 to 2.5:1.

watchlist.entry_plan: BREAKOUT CONFIRMED at 1.1834. Candle closed above 1.1811. Wait for RETEST to 1.1815-1.1820 zone for entry. Do NOT chase at 1.1834. If no pullback to retest, skip — wait for Monday setup.
watchlist.size_plan: 1% risk = $100. SL 47 pips from entry 1.1817. Position = $100 / (47 * $10) = 0.21 lots
watchlist.rr_ratio: 1.77:1 to TP1, 1.77:1 to TP2 combined — Conv 4 exception applies
watchlist.thesis: BREAKOUT LIVE (Conv 4). DXY 97.70 (-0.52%). EUR/USD broke 1.1811 day high with closed candle. De-escalation + DXY weakness dominant. No Fed hawkish risk. All 7 gates pass.
watchlist.invalidation: If EUR/USD drops back below 1.1780 without retesting, cancel setup. Pullback below 1.1770 = full cancel.

watchlist.invalidation_reason: WTI broke above $92.40 pivot (now $93.74) on Iran deal doubts + inventory draw. Pre-set invalidation rule triggered. Do NOT short here — thesis has reversed.
watchlist.monitor_for_re-entry: If Iran extension CONFIRMED and WTI drops back below $89, a new short setup may form. Do not chase.

market_context.session: NY session (19:08 IST). Friday. OIL SHORT INVALIDATED. NO NEW POSITIONS.
key_events_upcoming: TODAY: Fed Barkin + Waller speaking (not yet spoken)
Apr 18-19: BoJ policy meeting (hold at 0.75% expected)
Apr 22: US-Iran ceasefire EXPIRY (CRITICAL — doubts resurfacing, WTI spiking to $93.74)
market_context.hormuz_status: PARTIAL DE-ESCALATION. Hormuz declared open for remaining ceasefire period. Israel-Lebanon ceasefire started. WTI dropped from $93.74 spike back to $90.79. Trump says US-Iran deal 'possible soon' — talks could resume this weekend. BUT Iran deputy FM rejects temporary deal, wants comprehensive settlement. Gap still wide (nuclear terms, enrichment, 20yr vs 5yr). Deal in months, not days. Apr 22 = critical — if ceasefire expires without extension, Hormuz risk returns.
market_context.dominant_theme: DE-ESCALATION RETURNING. Hormuz open. Israel-Lebanon ceasefire live. WTI back to $90.79 (falling from $93.74). Gold $4,885 (holding ATH — partial safe-haven). Trump/Iran talks possible this weekend. AUDUSD long thesis strengthened. EURUSD testing 1.1811 breakout zone. All setups contingent on Monday Iran clarity. BoJ Apr 18-19 + Apr 22 deadline are the two remaining binary risks.

trade_history.exit_reason: SL hit (trailing stop at breakeven). De-escalation regime shift killed Gold rally. Peak unrealized +$52.20 at $4,871.
SL hit (trailing stop at breakeven $90). WTI bounced from $87.79 back above $90. Peak unrealized +$1.74 at $88.20.
trade_history.lessons: Trailing stop saved us from a reversal. Entry thesis correct (double-top held). WTI just had more bounce left.
